name: mscgenjs
when_to_use: 需要正式的协议/电信 Message Sequence Chart(MSC 记号:parallel coregion、method-call 弧、timer、box)时用它;一般开发者时序图用 @zenuml/core 或 mermaid sequence。喂一段 MscGen / Xù / MsGenny 源码字符串,inputType 选方言。license 为 GPL-3.0(copyleft)——分发/集成前评估许可影响。
why_valuable: MSC(ITU-T Z.120)的 MscGen/Xù/MsGenny 形式化记号——并行 coregion、方法调用弧、timer、box——mermaid 默认时序图和手绘 SVG 都表达不准;mscgenjs 解析这三种 DSL 并渲染出合规 MSC,渲染回调直接给出 SVG 字符串便于二次处理。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need formal protocol/telecom Message Sequence Charts (MSC notation: parallel coregions, method-call arcs, timers, and boxes); use @zenuml/core or mermaid sequence for ordinary developer sequence diagrams. Supply an MscGen / Xù / MsGenny source string and choose the dialect with inputType. The license is GPL-3.0 (copyleft), so evaluate licensing impact before distribution or integration.
en.why_valuable: The formal MscGen/Xù/MsGenny notation for MSC (ITU-T Z.120) includes parallel coregions, method-call arcs, timers, and boxes that a default mermaid sequence diagram or hand-drawn SVG cannot express accurately; mscgenjs parses all three DSLs and renders a compliant MSC, with the render callback directly returning an SVG string for further processing.

data_in.note: Input is an MscGen/Xù/MsGenny DSL source string, with inputType selecting the dialect. renderMsc finds its target through (options.window||window).document.getElementById(elementId), so it recognizes only light DOM; the callback's second argument pSuccess is the rendered SVG string (inject it for shadow scenarios).

schema.source: string -- MscGen/xu/msgenny source, for example 'msc { a,b; a=>>b[label="hi"]; }'
schema.styleAdditions?: string -- additional CSS inlined into the output SVG

spec.note: The output SVG sizes itself to its content and needs no fixed pixel height; give the container width:100% plus overflow:auto. Do not use vh.

data_in.note: 输入是 MscGen/Xù/MsGenny 的 DSL 源码字符串,inputType 选方言。renderMsc 通过 (options.window||window).document.getElementById(elementId) 找目标——只认 light DOM;回调第二参 pSuccess 是渲染好的 SVG 字符串(shadow 场景用它注入)。

schema.source: string —— MscGen/xu/msgenny 源码,如 'msc { a,b; a=>>b[label="hi"]; }'
schema.additionalTemplate?: string —— 命名样式,取自 getAllowedValues().namedStyle
schema.styleAdditions?: string —— 额外 CSS,内联进输出 SVG

spec.note: 输出 SVG 按内容自适应尺寸,无需固定像素高;容器给 width:100% + overflow:auto。禁 vh。

example._why: 三种方言语法不同,minimal 钉死默认 mscgen 方言的最小合法程序。

uplink: display 默认不上行;无内建交互回调,SVG 静态产物。

carriers.widget: supported:回调取 SVG 字符串注入 shadow,临时 light 宿主用后即删
carriers.codex: supported:ESM CDN,无 worker/wasm/uplink 硬依赖

isolation.evidence: +esm named exports renderMsc/translateMsc/getParser/getGraphicsRenderer/getTextRenderer/getAllowedValues/version. types/mscgen.d.ts: renderMsc(pScript:string, pOptions?:IRenderOptions, pCallBack?:(err:Error, svg:string)=>void):void; IRenderOptions={elementId?(default '__svg', assumed to pre-exist), inputType?('mscgen'|'msgenny'|'xu'|'json', default 'mscgen'), mirrorEntitiesOnBottom?, additionalTemplate?, includeSource?, styleAdditions?, window?(defaults to browser window)} — schema pins source+inputType, both consumed by boot. Render target resolved via (options.window||window).document.getElementById(elementId), i.e. light-DOM only (ShadowRoot elements are not found); the callback's pSuccess returns the finished SVG string, which the widget boot injects into shadowRoot. globalStyleInjection=no: the single createElement("style") is emitted INSIDE the generated SVG (scoped), not document.head (grep: 0 document.head). globalDomMutation=yes: renders into the given light-DOM elementId; widget path creates a transient off-screen host on document.body then removes it. globalEvents=no. License GPL-3.0 (strong copyleft) — flag for distribution. shadowCompatible=conditional via callback→inject pattern.
